div.p: Version: 1.0.4 | Layout: Topic Sharding | Protocol: MQTT-Compatible
Hash Function go shard = crc32(topic) % N_SHARDS

g.title: Subscribes to specific topic Routes to single shard
Subscribes to pattern (e.g., stocks/+/#) Registered on ALL shards

div.p: Messages across shards have no guaranteed order relative to each other.
The Wildcard Subscriber Problem: Because the network paths from Shard 0 and Shard 1 differ, a wildcard subscriber might receive T2 before T1, even though T1 was published first globally.

ol.li: Per-topic Sequencing: Use monotonic sequence IDs per topic.
Lamport Timestamps: Attach logical clocks to all messages.
Idempotent Consumers: Logic should not rely on cross-topic ordering.
Sticky Routing: Route same ProducerID to same shard.

g.title: Subscribes to specific topic Routes to single shard
Subscribes to pattern (e.g., stocks/+/#) Registered on ALL shards
